scripts.postinstall: mkdir -p public/ast && cp node_modules/web-tree-sitter/web-tree-sitter.wasm public/tree-sitter.wasm && cp node_modules/web-tree-sitter/web-tree-sitter.wasm public/web-tree-sitter.wasm && cp node_modules/tree-sitter-typescript/tree-sitter-typescript.wasm public/ast/tree-sitter-typescript.wasm
scripts.build: tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.build.json && vite build && tsc --project tsconfig.declarations.json
